metadata.description: VAIS Code — 코드 개발 도우미. 4 Primary (CEO/CPO/CTO/CSO) + 2 Secondary (CBO/COO 명시 호출). CEO 7 차원 알고리즘 + sub-agent 직접 박제 + AskUserQuestion 클릭

plugins.name: vais-code
plugins.description: AI code-development assistant simulating a virtual C-Suite. v2.0 — 4 Primary (CEO/CPO/CTO/CSO) auto-routing via CEO 7-dimension algorithm + 2 Secondary (CBO/COO) explicit call only. Sub-agent direct stamping with frontmatter 8 fields. CTO is the only mandatory PDCA (plan→design→do→qa→report).
